zh.lifeSummary: 當Eustace de Burgo於大約1005年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Jean de Burgo45歲，母親Elensie Jean Meulan32歲。他於1021年與Madeleine de Vesci結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1057年7月3日在英國越可爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eustace de Burgo于大约1005年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Jean de Burgo45岁，母亲Elensie Jean Meulan32岁。他于1021年与Madeleine de Vesci结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1057年7月3日在英国越可爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burgo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Porfirio, Carolina, Domingos, Eduardo, Elvira, Jaime, Jose, Jose Luis, Rafael, Tiago.  Portuguese Joaquim, Joao.  Italian Rocco, Santo.
Spanish: habitational name from any of the many places in Spain called Burgo, from Spanish burgo ‘fortified place’, ‘hamlet’.

nameMeanings.name: Eustace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Old French form of the Late Greek names Eustakhios and Eustathios. These were evidently of separate origin, the former derived from eu ‘well, good’ + stakhys ‘grapes’, the latter from eu + stēnai ‘to stand’. However, the tradition is very confused. The name was introduced in this form to Britain by the Normans, among whom it was popular as a result of the fame of St Eustace , a Norman nobleman who was said to have been converted to Christianity by the vision of a crucifix between the antlers of the stag he was hunting.

historicEvents.title: Sweyn Forkbeard
historicEvents.description: The Danes raided and captured England. Sweyn, King of Danes, was declared King of England on Christmas Day.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Eustace de Burgo was born about 1005, in Normandy, France, his father, Jean de Burgo, was 45 and his mother, Elensie Jean Meulan, was 32. He married Madeleine de Vesci in 1021. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 3 July 1057, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eustace de Burgo est né environ 1005, à Normandie, France, son père, Jean de Burgo, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elensie Jean Meulan, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Madeleine de Vesci en 1021. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 3 juillet 1057, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eustace de Burgo um 1005 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Burgo 45 und seine Mutter Elensie Jean Meulan 32. Er hat 1021 Madeleine de Vesci geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 3. Juli 1057 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace de Burgo è nato il circa 1005 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Jean de Burgo, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Elensie Jean Meulan, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Madeleine de Vesci nel 1021. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 3 luglio 1057, nel Yorkshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eustace de Burgoが約1005年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Jean de Burgoは45歳，母Elensie Jean Meulanは32歳であった。1021年にMadeleine de Vesciと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1057年7月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eustace de Burgo(이)가 대략 1005년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Burgo(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Elensie Jean Meulan(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1021년 Madeleine de Vesci(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1057년 7월 3일 영국 요르크실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eustace de Burgo nasceu aproximadamente 1005, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean de Burgo, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elensie Jean Meulan, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Madeleine de Vesci em 1021. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 3 de julho de 1057, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eustace de Burgo родился около 1005 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Burgo было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elensie Jean Meulan, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Madeleine de Vesci в 1021 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 3 июля 1057 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eustace de Burgo nació aproximadamente 1005, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean de Burgo, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elensie Jean Meulan, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Madeleine de Vesci en 1021. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 3 de julio de 1057, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
